channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya Introduces Regulations for Private Electricity Trading on National Grid
item.description: The Kenyan government has rolled out fresh regulations that now permit private electricity generators, major consumers, and retail companies to trade power through a more liberalised electricity marke...

item.title: Labor breaks a major tax reform promise amid budget changes
item.description: In the latest budget announcement, the Labor government introduced changes to capital gains tax and negative gearing, which represent a significant shift from their previous election promises. Treasur...

item.title: National Assembly Outlines Formation of Impeachment Committee
item.description: National Assembly Speaker, Thoko Didiza, has set out the procedure for forming the Impeachment Committee under Section 89 of the Constitution, connected to the 2020 Phala Phala farm theft involving Pr...

item.title: Oshiomhole Calls for Nationalisation of MTN and South African Firms Over Xenophobic Attacks on Nigerians
item.description: Senator Adams Oshiomhole, representing Edo North, don talk say Nigerian lives must come first before any foreign investment. During one Arise TV interview, the former Edo governor defend him call for ...

item.title: Canadian Health Officials Monitor 26 Additional Low-Risk Hantavirus Contacts Following Cruise Ship Case
item.description: Canadian health authorities are reaching out to 26 additional individuals who were on the same flight as a confirmed hantavirus case linked to the MV Hondius cruise ship outbreak. According to Dr. Jos...

item.title: Lizzo criticises social media algorithms for hindering music promotion ahead of new album release
item.description: Lizzo has spoken out about the challenges of promoting her upcoming third studio album 'Bitch', set for release on 5 June. In a TikTok video posted on 12 May, the singer argued that modern algorithm-d...

item.title: Congress appoints VD Satheesan as Kerala CM after internal consultations
item.description: After ten days of intensive internal consultations, the Congress party has announced VD Satheesan as Kerala’s new Chief Minister. Satheesan was chosen over senior leaders KC Venugopal and Ramesh Chenn...

item.title: PAGASA Reports Danger-Level Heat in 48 Areas Across the Philippines
item.description: According to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA), up to 48 areas in the Philippines experienced danger-level heat on May 14, 2026. Tuguegarao in C...

item.title: Aleema Khan petitions IHC to declare Imran Khan's solitary confinement illegal
item.description: Aleema Khan, sister of former Prime Minister Imran Khan, has filed a writ petition in the Islamabad High Court (IHC) challenging the alleged solitary confinement of her brother. The petition, submitte...

item.title: US Destroys Most of Iran’s Naval Mines in Middle East Operations
item.description: According to a statement from US Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper, the United States has destroyed more than 90 per cent of Iran’s inventory of around 8,000 naval mines through over 700 airst...

item.title: Spotify Adopts Apple HLS Technology for Enhanced Video Podcast Distribution and Monetization
item.description: Spotify announced on May 14, 2026, that it will integrate Apple’s HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) video technology into its platform. This move builds on Apple’s recent implementation in Apple Podcasts and ...

item.title: Licensed counselor sentenced to 2 years for providing ketamine involved in Matthew Perry's death
item.description: Erik Fleming, a licensed drug addiction counselor, has been sentenced to two years in federal prison for his role in the death of actor Matthew Perry. Perry, best known for his role on the popular tel...

item.title: Delhi High Court judge moves contempt proceedings against AAP leaders over social media remarks
item.description: The Delhi High Court’s Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma on Thursday initiated contempt of court proceedings against Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia, and several other AAP leaders. This action follows alle...

item.title: Family Reunites with Son's Head After Burial Following Murder Investigation
item.description: In a heartbreaking yet relieving turn of events, the family of the late James Temba in Kitunda Kibeberu, Dar es Salaam, received the missing head of their son days after his burial. James had been bru...

item.title: ADC Accuses Tinubu Administration of Running a Ponzi Economy Amid Plans for Fresh $1.25 Billion World Bank Loan
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don hammer the Tinubu-led Federal Government say dem dey run Ponzi economy because of their plan to collect another $1.25 billion loan from World Bank. According ...

item.title: AFP Chief Warns of Political, Economic, and Information Threats Amid West Philippine Sea Tensions
item.description: MANILA — Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) Chief of Staff, Gen. Romeo Brawner Jr., urged Filipinos to adopt a wartime mindset due to ongoing political, economic, and informational challenges linke...

item.title: Canada considers providing naval, demining, and satellite support for Hormuz security mission
item.description: Canada is exploring options to support a multinational mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial waterway between Iran and Oman that carries roughly a quarter of global seaborne oil. Defence M...

item.title: GOP Lawmakers Worry Trump-Focused Midterm Strategy Could Backfire in Competitive Districts
item.description: Republican lawmakers are expressing growing concern over the National Republican Congressional Committee's decision to center its midterm campaign strategy on former President Donald Trump and the MAG...

item.title: Sandra Edoho levels allegations of infidelity and abuse against estranged husband Frank Edoho
item.description: Na real drama dey unfold between popular TV presenter Frank Edoho and him estranged wife Sandra Edoho. After Frank confirm say their marriage don end and dem don dey do divorce proceedings for almost ...

item.title: Geese launch exclusive sunglasses collaboration with Sub Sun
item.description: New York band Geese have unveiled a limited edition sunglasses collection in partnership with Sub Sun. The exclusive line features a distinctive 'bug eye' design with a mid wrap-around frame, crafted ...
